global_description: A medium-sized bird with a sleek, streamlined body. It has predominantly gray plumage with a lighter gray or white underbelly. The bird features a distinctive black mask across its eyes and a slightly forked tail. Its wings are long and pointed, aiding in agile flight.

part_details.plumage: Smooth gray feathers covering the body, darker on the back and lighter on the belly.
part_details.mask: Black marking across the eyes, contrasting with the gray head.
part_details.tail: Slightly forked, gray with a subtle notch.
part_details.wings: Long and pointed, gray with a streamlined shape.
part_details.underbelly: Light gray or white, contrasting with the darker upper parts.

spatial_relations: The black mask is positioned across the eyes.
The wings extend from the sides of the body.
The tail is located at the rear, slightly forked.
